scripts.dev:gateway: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@daemon/api-gateway^... && DAEMON_API_KEY=daemon-dev-key DAEMON_INGEST_SKIP_UPSTREAM=1 DAEMON_POLICY_SKIP_UPSTREAM=1 pnpm --filter @daemon/api-gateway dev
scripts.dev:up: pnpm run build --filter @daemon/cli && pnpm exec daemon-cli dev up
scripts.test:repo: DAEMON_API_KEY=daemon-dev-key pnpm run build && pnpm exec turbo run build --force --filter=@daemon/data-platform --filter=@daemon/ontology --filter=@daemon/ontology-query && DAEMON_API_KEY=daemon-dev-key node --test --import tsx tests/policy/policy-fixture.test.ts tests/ontology/registry.test.ts tests/ontology/pack-compliance.test.ts ontology/store/durable-ontology-store.test.ts ontology/graph-schema/pack-graph-schema.test.ts products/ontology-query/validate-cypher.test.ts tests/tenancy/isolation.test.ts tests/architecture/daemon-runtime.test.ts tests/contract/api-contract.test.ts tests/e2e/ingest-read-write.test.ts tests/e2e/ingest-read-write-http.test.ts tests/integration/stores.integration.test.ts tests/integration/audit-postgres.integration.test.ts tests/integration/ontology-durability.integration.test.ts tests/integration/ontology-propagation.integration.test.ts tests/integration/ontology-rls.integration.test.ts tests/integration/ontology-neo4j-sync.integration.test.ts tests/integration/ontology-query.integration.test.ts tests/integration/gateway-http.test.ts tests/integration/gateway-security.test.ts tests/integration/search-hybrid.integration.test.ts tests/integration/lakehouse-bronze.integration.test.ts tests/integration/customer-gpt.integration.test.ts tests/integration/search-replay.integration.test.ts tests/integration/lakehouse-silver-gold.integration.test.ts tests/integration/ingest-http-pull.integration.test.ts tests/integration/ingest-connectors.integration.test.ts tests/integration/dsdk-production-smoke.integration.test.ts tests/integration/foundry-parity-golden.integration.test.ts external-systems/adapters/system-adapter.test.ts toolchain/plugins/plugin-host.test.ts
scripts.spec:check: node scripts/spec-check.mjs && node scripts/check-openapi-gateway-parity.mjs && node scripts/codegen-check.mjs
scripts.release:check: pnpm run build && cd packages/platform-types && npm pack --dry-run && cd ../sdk && npm pack --dry-run && cd ../cli && npm pack --dry-run
